content.text: US checkout API requests saw elevated 503 errors from 14:05 to 14:32 UTC after Redis memory exhaustion during a catalog promotion. The team added cache capacity, error rates recovered, and no completed orders were lost, though some customers retried.

The payroll export reached the vendor at 06:18 CT, 18 minutes late, after vendor API rate limits delayed delivery. Internal generation and payroll calculations were unaffected, and there is no indication of employee-data exposure.

Mobile version 4.12 caused startup crashes for Android 14 users with biometric login, with crash-free sessions falling to 71% for that segment. Rollout stopped at 25% and version 4.11 was restored; the suspected lifecycle cause is not confirmed.
